en: Net stat modifier versus the enemy. Your Inspiration raises your healing, shields, extra energy and buffs by 1% per point; the enemy's Intimidation lowers them by 1% per point. They offset, so this is the leftover: positive helps you, negative hurts you.
zh: 对敌方的净属性加成。我方鼓舞使治疗、护盾、额外能量和增益效果每点提升1%；敌方威慑使其每点降低1%。两者相互抵消，剩余即为此值：正数有利于你，负数对你不利。
